packages.name: guzzlehttp/guzzle

suggest.ext-intl: Required for Internationalized Domain Name (IDN) support
suggest.psr/log: Required for using the Log middleware

packages.description: Guzzle is a PHP HTTP client library

packages.name: guzzlehttp/psr7
packages.description: PSR-7 message implementation that also provides common utility methods

suggest.ext-dom: to convert the URI into an HTML anchor tag
suggest.ext-fileinfo: to create Data URI from file contennts
suggest.ext-intl: to handle IDN host with the best performance
suggest.ext-uri: to use the PHP native URI class
suggest.jeremykendall/php-domain-parser: to further parse the URI host and resolve its Public Suffix and Top Level Domain
suggest.league/uri-components: to provide additional tools to manipulate URI objects components
suggest.league/uri-polyfill: to backport the PHP URI extension for older versions of PHP
suggest.rowbot/url: to handle URLs using the WHATWG URL Living Standard specification
suggest.symfony/polyfill-intl-idn: to handle IDN host via the Symfony polyfill if ext-intl is not present

packages.name: league/uri-interfaces

suggest.ext-intl: to handle IDN host with the best performance
suggest.rowbot/url: to handle URLs using the WHATWG URL Living Standard specification
suggest.symfony/polyfill-intl-idn: to handle IDN host via the Symfony polyfill if ext-intl is not present

packages.description: Common tools for parsing and resolving RFC3987/RFC3986 URI

packages.description: PSR-17: Common interfaces for PSR-7 HTTP message factories

packages.description: Provides a representation for source code locations and spans.
